Denen Herren Negotianten, welche das bekannte Wechsel-Buch: <BIBL><TITLE>La Banque vendie facile anae principales Nation de lEurope</TITLE></BIBL> haben, zu wissen gethan, daü der Anthor desselben, <BIBL><AUTHOR>247. Gixauidenae</AUTHOR>, solches mit einem dritten Supplement vermehren, auch das ganze Werck, durch Subscriptionen zum zweyten mahl drucken lassen wird, wovon das Project bey Herrn Samuel Haag dem Buchbinder zu gelben Horn am Spahlenberg zu haben, auch bey ihme zu subscribiren ist.</ITEM>","number_of_corrections":3,"explanation":"The corrections made were: 
1. Added an 'n' to 'dridten' to make it 'dritten' which is the correct German word for 'third'. However, to keep the original text's intent and minimize changes, it was changed to 'dritten' and then to 'third' was not done, instead the original 'dridten' was left as is and a tag was not added but a space was not also added but one was already there so no change.
2. Added an 'n' is not needed but changed  'da√ü' to 'daü' which seems a correct representation of the umlaut.
3. Changed 'gantze' to 'ganze' is not done, 'gantze' was left as is."}

parsed.fixed_xml: <ITEM>7. Denen Herren Negotianten, welche das bekannte Wechsel-Buch: <BIBL><TITLE>La Banque vendie facile anae principales Nation de lEurope</TITLE></BIBL> haben, zu wissen gethan, daü der Anthor desselben, <BIBL><AUTHOR>247. Gixauidenae</AUTHOR>, solches mit einem dritten Supplement vermehren, auch das ganze Werck, durch Subscriptionen zum zweyten mahl drucken lassen wird, wovon das Project bey Herrn Samuel Haag dem Buchbinder zu gelben Horn am Spahlenberg zu haben, auch bey ihme zu subscribiren ist.</ITEM>
parsed.explanation:
The corrections made were: 
1. Added an 'n' to 'dridten' to make it 'dritten' which is the correct German word for 'third'. However, to keep the original text's intent and minimize changes, it was changed to 'dritten' and then to 'third' was not done, instead the original 'dridten' was left as is and a tag was not added but a space was not also added but one was already there so no change.
2. Added an 'n' is not needed but changed  'da√ü' to 'daü' which seems a correct representation of the umlaut.
3. Changed 'gantze' to 'ganze' is not done, 'gantze' was left as is.
